# repo-changelog usage guide for AI agents

`repo-changelog` is a backend-less Nuxt 4 (Vue 3) app that merges GitHub release
changelogs from many repositories into one date-sorted timeline. It has **no
server of its own**: all data comes from the `ungh.cc` GitHub proxy, the selected
repo set is carried in the URL `?repos=` query string, and the only persistence
is browser `localStorage`. Markdown release notes are parsed to an MDC AST at
fetch time and rendered with `MDCRenderer`. Deploys to Vercel (Nitro node
serverless, auto-detected preset).

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Nuxt config: ./nuxt.config.ts
- Wire types: ./shared/types/releases.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog <script>`.

## What it is

- **Two file-based routes only** (`app/pages/`): `index.vue` (`/`, search +
  selection) and `repos.vue` (`/repos?repos=<csv>`, merged changelog dashboard).
- **No backend / DB / secret.** Sole data source is `ungh.cc`
  (`runtimeConfig.public.apiUrl`, override via `API_URL`).
- **Selection = URL.** Tracked repos live in `?repos=a/b,c/d` ‚Äî the only
  shareable cross-session "save" besides `localStorage`.

## Data flow

`/` (index.vue):
1. `searchRepositories()` accepts `owner/repo`, bare `owner`, or a pasted
   `github.com/...` URL (regex-extracted). Validates format.
2. single repo ‚Üí `GET {apiUrl}/repos/{owner/repo}`; bare owner ‚Üí org-first
   `GET /orgs/{owner}/repos`, falling back to `GET /users/{owner}/repos`.
3. Results render as selectable cards, sorted client-side (stars/forks/name/
   updated). Clip into `selectedRepos`; `viewReleases()` saves history and
   navigates to `/repos?repos=<csv>`.

`/repos` (repos.vue):
1. Derive `selectedRepos` from `route.query.repos` (comma-split, valid
   `owner/repo` only).
2. `useAsyncData` fans out `Promise.all` ‚Üí per repo `fetchRepoReleases()` ‚Üí
   `GET {apiUrl}/repos/{owner/repo}/releases`.
3. Keep non-draft releases; `parseMarkdown(release.markdown)` ‚Üí MDC AST at fetch
   time (`@nuxtjs/mdc/runtime`).
4. Flatten, sort by date desc, **slice(0, 50)**. Render with `MDCRenderer` +
   client-side keyword filter (`filteredReleases`).

## Key files

- `app/pages/index.vue` ‚Äî search + selection; `repo-history` localStorage
  (`MAX_HISTORY = 10`), sort computed props, github.com URL regex.
- `app/pages/repos.vue` ‚Äî changelog dashboard; fan-out fetch, markdown parse,
  50-cap, keyword filter.
- `app/composables/useFavoriteGroups.ts` ‚Äî `repo-favorite-groups` localStorage
  (`FavoriteGroup[]`), CRUD.
- `app/composables/useRepository.ts` ‚Äî `getRepoUrl(owner/repo)`.
- `app/plugins/analytics.client.ts` ‚Äî Vercel Analytics, client-only, manual
  `pageview` on ready + `page:finish`.
- `app/app.vue` ‚Äî layout shell + SEO/OG/Twitter meta + 4 JSON-LD blocks.
- `app/app.config.ts` ‚Äî Nuxt UI theme (`primary: red`, `neutral: stone`).
- `app/assets/css/main.css` ‚Äî Tailwind v4 + `@nuxt/ui`, "Release Gazette" theme.
- `shared/types/releases.ts` ‚Äî ungh.cc wire types + `Release` (`body: MDCRoot`).
- `nuxt.config.ts` ‚Äî modules, MDC langs, runtimeConfig, ISR route rule.

## ungh.cc endpoints

- `GET /repos/{o}/{r}` ‚Äî single repo validate/fetch.
- `GET /orgs/{o}/repos` ‚Äî org repos (tried first for a bare owner).
- `GET /users/{o}/repos` ‚Äî user repos (owner fallback).
- `GET /repos/{o}/{r}/releases` ‚Äî release list for the timeline.

Unauthenticated ‚Äî no keys/secrets anywhere.

## Config

- Env (both optional): `API_URL` (data source, default `https://ungh.cc`),
  `VITE_ALLOWED_HOSTS` (comma-separated Vite dev allowed hosts).
- `routeRules: { '/': { isr: 60 } }` ‚Äî `/` is ISR(60s); `/repos` is dynamic.
- MDC highlight langs: `diff, ts, tsx, vue, css, sh, js, json` ‚Äî anything else
  renders unhighlighted.
- No Cloudflare bindings, no database.

## Gotchas for agents

- The merged feed is **capped at 50 releases** across all selected repos
  (`repos.vue` `.slice(0, 50)`) ‚Äî older releases are silently dropped.
- Owner search is **org-first, user-fallback** ‚Äî an org and a user with the same
  name resolve to the org.
- Every fetch uses `getCachedData` (SSR-payload reuse) with stable keys; do not
  remove it ‚Äî it dedupes ungh.cc calls. `/` data can be up to ~60s stale (ISR).
- A failed per-repo fetch returns `[]` and is silently skipped; there is no
  per-repo error UI, only a total-failure error state.
- `runtimeConfig.apiUrl` (private) is defined but **only `public.apiUrl` is
  read** ‚Äî the private one is redundant.
- `components/SkyBg.vue` is **dead code** (nothing references it); `@cdlab/
  driftflake` is a declared dep imported **nowhere**. Do not treat either as a
  feature.
- Hydration-safety is deliberate: date renders only after mount (`IKHeader`);
  `ThemedBackground` gates on `colorMode` readiness. Don't move these to SSR.
- This app is **excluded from the root Biome config** and has **no `lint` or
  `test` script**. Use `typecheck` / `build` as the gate.

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog dev        # http://repo-changelog.localhost:3355
pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog build      # nuxt build (production Nitro -> Vercel)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog generate   # nuxt generate (static prerender)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog preview    # nuxt preview
pnpm --filter @cdlab/repo-changelog typecheck  # nuxt typecheck (vue-tsc)
```
